summary: Spec is implementation-ready. All 5 requirements have scenarios and tests mapped. Logic flowchart accurately depicts the recursive condition resolution. Changes cover all affected files.
content:
## Review: enhancement-resolver-conditional-exports-import-require-browse-spec

**Verdict: APPROVED**

### Checklist

- [x] Overview substantive — identifies hardcoded condition list, impact on React 18+/Vue 3, fix approach
- [x] Requirements well-defined (R1-R5) with IDs and descriptions
- [x] Scenarios cover all requirements — 8 scenarios
- [x] Logic flowchart depicts recursive condition resolution
- [x] Changes list covers 5 affected files
- [x] Test plan has 10 tests mapped to requirements
- [x] No duplicate section types

### Notes (non-blocking)

1. No explicit scenario for R3 tiebreaking (T10 covers it)
2. Consider deeply-nested scenario in future iteration
